recharge_regularity.label: Recharge regularity
recharge_regularity.action: Keep mobile recharges regular for the next three months.

recharge_amount_volatility.label: Recharge amount stability
recharge_amount_volatility.action: Use a more consistent recharge amount where practical.

utility_on_time_ratio.label: Utility payment punctuality
utility_on_time_ratio.action: Pay utility bills before the due date for three consecutive months.

utility_avg_days_late.label: Average utility delay
utility_avg_days_late.action: Use reminders or autopay to reduce the average payment delay.

commerce_frequency.label: Digital commerce activity
commerce_frequency.action: Maintain a stable pattern of legitimate digital transactions.

commerce_refund_ratio.label: Refund ratio
commerce_refund_ratio.action: Avoid unnecessary cancellations and maintain predictable commerce activity.

transaction_stability.label: Transaction stability
transaction_stability.action: Keep transaction activity steady instead of highly irregular.

cashflow_volatility.label: Cash-flow volatility
cashflow_volatility.action: Reserve recurring expenses early to reduce month-to-month cash-flow swings.

savings_rate.label: Savings rate
savings_rate.action: Maintain a small automatic monthly savings transfer.

savings_streak_months.label: Savings continuity
savings_streak_months.action: Continue the savings habit for at least three more months.

digital_tenure_months.label: Digital history length
digital_tenure_months.action: Continue using the same verified financial channels consistently.

failed_payment_ratio.label: Failed payment ratio
failed_payment_ratio.action: Keep enough balance before scheduled payments to avoid failures.

consent_completeness.label: Consent completeness
consent_completeness.action: Review and complete the eligible consented signal sources.
